---
title: MirrorReset
filters:
  - quarto-svelte
quarto-svelte:
  use:
    - ../components/MirrorReset.svelte
---

This document shows you how to use a basic example Svelte component called `Circles.svelte`.

Create one using an HTML template:



```{ojs}
myMirrorReset = html`<my-mirrorreset></my-mirrorreset>`
```
